issue: Difficulty: ❌ TRIVIAL - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-express-trivia-worker for the HARD/python difficulty gate by adding Appendix H-2026-09 sequential primary floor checkpoints with new INC-14/INC-15 rulings that change bob's official score from 5 to 13 when applied correctly; updated scoring_standard.md, instruction.md, rulings.json, helpers, solution, tests (including test_sequential_primary_floor_checkpoint), rubrics, and submission explanations; made the broken starter worker sort ingest by ts and skip per-ruling primary checkpoints alongside the existing amend/deferred bugs; bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to r14.
